position_ids.note: constant at last-seen-token position for all draft steps

sliding_k.note: target's last sliding_attention layer K, shape matches target head_dim=256

full_k.note: target's last full_attention layer K, shape matches target global_head_dim=512

logits.note: vocabulary logits; use argmax for greedy draft token

projected_state.note: post_projection output; concat with next token embed as next draft step's inputs_embeds

note: MTP spec-decode requires the TARGET ONNX to expose last_hidden_state and shared_kv_states. transformers.js 4.2.0 does not export these. File upstream issue: github.com/huggingface/transformers.js/issues
